7.name: Diplomatic Signals
7.description: Travel advisories upgraded, China restricts travel to Taiwan
7.summary: Checked US, UK, Japan, Australia travel advisories for Taiwan. All at normal levels (3 of 4 sources reachable).

10.name: Financial Stress
10.description: TWD/USD spike, TAIEX drop beyond normal volatility
10.summary: Checked TWD/USD exchange rate and TAIEX index via Yahoo Finance. Both within normal volatility range.

3.name: Airspace Control
3.description: NOTAM closures near Fujian/Strait, civilian flight rerouting
3.summary: Checked OpenSky (38 flights in strait, normal: 50-150). No military closures or flight rerouting anomalies. Failed: NOTAMs (NOTAM_API_URL not configured).

4.name: Maritime Control
4.description: MSA exclusion zones, shipping avoidance, fishing fleet recall
4.summary: Checked China Maritime Safety Administration for exclusion zones, shipping restrictions, fishing fleet recalls. None found.

5.name: Taiwan Domestic Readiness
5.description: Taiwan MND raises alert level, cancels leave, activates reserves
5.summary: Checked Taiwan MND, Focus Taiwan for alert-level changes, leave cancellations, reserve activations. None found.

6.name: Cyber & Infrastructure
6.description: Cyberattacks on Taiwan infra, cable cuts, GNSS jamming
6.summary: Checked TWCERT, Cloudflare Radar, IODA for cyberattacks, internet outages, cable disruptions. None detected.

1.name: Force Concentration
1.description: PLA ship/aircraft/missile repositioning beyond exercise norms
1.summary: Checked X/OSINT accounts, Taiwan MND. No qualifying evidence (after dropping speculation/hypothetical/manipulation chunks). Failed: Japan MOD (blocked).

2.name: Logistics & Mobilization
2.description: Fuel staging, ammo movement, reserve call-ups, transport requisition
2.summary: Checked X/OSINT accounts, Taiwan MND. No qualifying evidence (after dropping speculation/hypothetical/manipulation chunks). Failed: Japan MOD (blocked).

8.name: Allied Response
8.summary: Observed act corroborated by tier-1 OSINT. Checked X/OSINT accounts, Taiwan MND. Failed: Japan MOD (blocked).

evidence_quotes.key_phrase: The aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford will depart the Middle East and begin the sail for home in the coming days, US officials say -WaPo
evidence_quotes.why: US carrier repositioning out of Middle East; relevant to allied posture but not Taiwan-specific.

evidence_quotes.key_phrase: USS Higgins (DDG-76), a U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer forward deployed to the U.S. Indo-Pacific Command (INDOPACOM), suffered a major main space engineering fire
evidence_quotes.why: INDOPACOM destroyer disabled — affects US Pacific posture; tangential to Taiwan readiness.

evidence_quotes.key_phrase: The Pentagon is considering outsourcing warship design and building to Korea and Japan with a proposed $1.85 billion feas
evidence_quotes.why: Mentions Japan/Korea defense industrial cooperation; not a posture change re Taiwan.

8.rationale: [reported_event/observed_act] US carrier repositioning out of Middle East; relevant to allied posture but not Taiwan-specific. [reported_event/observed_act] INDOPACOM destroyer disabled — affects US Pacific posture; tangential to Taiwan readiness. [reported_event/vocabulary_only] Mentions Japan/Korea defense industrial cooperation; not a posture change re Taiwan.

9.name: Rhetoric & Political Pressure
9.description: State media narrative shift, political crisis, coercion escalation
9.summary: Checked Xinhua, Global Times, Focus Taiwan, Taipei Times for rhetoric shifts or political crisis keywords. Normal levels (3 of 4 feeds reachable).
